OCR Text: AFFIRMATIONS

To Attract Your Dream Job

I release all negative thoughts and beliefs getting
in the way of my dream job manifesting

I am an energetic match to my
dream job and salary

I am successful in the work that I do

My energy is contagious, people can't
help but want to work with me

Everything about my new job makes me feel

happy and fulfilled

Image: dating.jpg
Caption: the uy truth about dating
OCR Text: The Ugly Truth of Dating?

A group of students at Columbia Business School were asked to rate the
importance of attributes of potential dates at a speed dating event. They
were asked to distribute 100 points among the 6 attributes, based on
the attributes’ importance in dating decisions.

ATTRACTIVE

INTELLIGENT

FUN

SINCERE

SHARED INTERESTS

AMBITIOUS

Males value attractiveness
more than females.

Females value intelligence
more than males.

Males and females are on

the same page when it
comes to fun.

Males value sincerity less
than females.

Females value shared
interests more than males.

Males value ambition Least.
